sources.title: AI in Materials Discovery Market to Reach $2.77 Billion by 2030: High CAGR of 30% Expected
Global Materials Informatics Market 2026-2036: Microsoft, Google DeepMind, Meta FAIR, IBM Research, and NVIDIA Have Entered the Field As Direct Competitors and Infrastructure Providers
sources.key_data: Big Tech entry: Microsoft, Google DeepMind, Meta FAIR, IBM Research, NVIDIA all in materials informatics as of May 2026

sources.title: Jeff Bezos backs CuspAI in reported $400M raise that could value it at $2.6B
sources.key_data: CuspAI $400M raise at $2.6B valuation (from $520M 9 months prior); Bezos Expeditions + Kleiner Perkins; Geoffrey Hinton + Yann LeCun advisory board

sources.title: CuspAI to hit $2.6bn valuation with backing from Jeff Bezos, reports say
sources.key_data: CuspAI founded 2024, Cambridge UK; Dr Chad Edwards + Prof Max Welling; term sheets signed for $400M round

sources.title: AI materials now needs to move into the real world
sources.key_data: Total 2025 VC in AI materials exceeds $1.2B; includes Lila Sciences $200M seed (Flagship Pioneering) and CuspAI $130M Series A

sources.title: Google DeepMind's new AI tool helped create more than 700 new materials
sources.key_data: GNoME: 2.2M stable crystal structures discovered; 380,000 stable; 52,000 novel lithium-ion conductors; 736 already synthesized by external researchers

sources.title: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs introduce AlphaFold 3
sources.key_data: AlphaFold 3 extends molecular prediction to DNA, RNA, ligands; 50%+ improvement over existing methods; jointly developed with Isomorphic Labs

sources.title: AlphaFold is five years old — these charts show how it revolutionized science
sources.key_data: Nobel Prize in Chemistry 2024 awarded for AlphaFold methodology — first Nobel primarily for an AI system

sources.title: Nobel Chemist Omar Yaghi Bets the Future of Science in AI — Thinks It Can Discover Next Miracle Material
sources.key_data: Nobel laureate chemist Omar Yaghi public endorsement of AI materials discovery as path to next miracle material (July 2026)

sources.title: Berkeley Lab Leads Effort to Build AI Assistant for Energy Materials Discovery
sources.publisher: Berkeley Lab News Center / US DOE
sources.key_data: FORUM-AI: DOE-funded multi-institution project to use AI and supercomputers for battery and semiconductor materials discovery

sources.title: AI in Materials Discovery Market Size, Share | CAGR of 26.4%
sources.key_data: Supporting market size and CAGR data; key players include Google, Microsoft, BASF, IBM, Schrödinger, Citrine Informatics

sources.title: Why AI and circularity are key to the future of materials
sources.key_data: Climate urgency and circularity driving AI materials discovery; WEF endorsement of AI as materials sustainability tool

unverified_claims: Market share percentages for individual Big Tech players (Google ~25%, Microsoft ~20%, NVIDIA ~15%, CuspAI ~8%, Schrödinger ~10%) are estimates based on market reports and do not reflect audited revenue figures
3M growth estimate of +45% Q2 2026 is inferred from CuspAI valuation jump and Big Tech market entry signals, not a directly measured search or revenue metric
Search volume estimate of 60K+ per month is inferred from trend signals; not sourced from a keyword research tool in this report
